arts.ttl: “Quality” player could be key to unlocking major Liverpool transfer deal

The France international has often been linked with Liverpool, with a recent report from Defensa Central claiming the Reds were keen on him in a potential €100m deal. arts.ttl: 'Diary filling up' with transfer talks as Liverpool rival Man Utd for Amorim favourite
arts.sum: Liverpool are hoping to rival Manchester United in the race to sign one of Europe’s biggest wonderkids, with ‘the diary filling up’ over transfer talks for the teenage prodigy. One of the players being considered is Geovany Quenda, who broke into Sporting’s team this season playing under Amorim as a right-sided wing back.

This coincides with the absence of Rodri, who is injured and set to be out for the next few months.
